title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Kaido, Reverie Delegates, Unknown person #13, Five Elders, King Neptune as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Before you've

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who was that?! Someone just punched the celestial dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: N- None of this has anything to do with me! I wasn't in-olved, you hippos!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA... I'm so sorry. As a celestial dragon myself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am so Embar- Rassed! Please, forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Celestial Dragon?!

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: Let go of the Princess, you links!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone, please! Accept my apology! A witless fool has polluted the mingling Plaza with fear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not think you remember me, King Neptune.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I owe a great debt to the Ryugu kingdom. I have waited long for this day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The day that you all come here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Could you be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 10 years ago, someone washed up on the shores

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: of the Ryugu kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: A foolish celestial dragon. Me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Save my life, you idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The late queen OtoHime scolded and re- formed me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: She made me into a human!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to support you all with every- thing I have!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What is it you want,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that prompted you to come all the way here?

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: It is reverie. Given who you are,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: These politics are not for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I know. Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We shall hear you out. Leave us, soldiers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish to talk with you about a certain pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why is he here?!

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
